baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Scaffold a new exercises section with problems, solutions, and explainers.
evals.expected_output: A consistent exercise directory structure with lintable stubs, solutions, and explanatory material.
assertions: Uses existing course naming and formatting patterns.
Runs or reports lint/validation for generated files.
